title: llm.embed
description: Text embeddings through the configured backend (explicit provider > DEFAULT_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER). Returns {status: 'ok', embeddings: NormalizedEmbeddings, provider_used: string} or {status: 'failure', reason: string}. Vectors preserve input order; the ledger records counts/usage only — never the texts, never the vectors.

texts.description: Batch of texts to embed. Output vectors preserve this order. Empty batches and empty strings are rejected.

timeout_seconds.description: Hard cap on the embeddings request.

provider_options.description: Free-form per-provider passthrough, applied AFTER the adapter's own request params — pin provider specifics without a core release. Unknown keys go to the provider as-is.
